pageContext.name: Kushala Daora
pageContext.description: 'With this series of statues my goal was to create cute poses and interactions between large monsters and endemic life, rather than typical attack poses seen elsewhere. Happy Hunting!' - Ricardo Clatworthy, Creative Director  Kushala Daora is a powerful Elder Dragon possessing metallic-like hide, and large wings that connect both at its shoulders and at the base of its tail, making them appear very large in relation to its body. During battle, Kushala Daora has the ability to create strong winds it uses for both offense and defense, making it a formidable opponent for hunters who would dare to challenge it.  Sideshow and Animegami Studios are proud to present Kushala Daora PVC Figure, a chibi statue as part of the Ancient Forest Set!
